children.text: Welcome to the Track My Parcel service.

Your parcel has been delivered, please check it to ensure that it is right at your doorstep.

Your parcel has been marked as Lost. We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused. You are eligible for compensation.
Your parcel has encountered an unusual status and requires manual review. Please contact our support team for more information.

children.text: Hey friend 👋
How can I help you?

messages.content: You are an AI Routing Assistant. Categorize the user message into exactly ONE keyword: TRACK, ISSUE, REFUND, REPORT, HUMAN, or FAQ. If unsure, output: DEFAULT. Output ONLY the word.

children.text: 😔 We are truly sorry to hear that your parcel appears to be lost.
📋 Here are the details we have on file:
🔍 Tracking ID:
{{tracking_id}}
📍 Last Known Location:
{{current_location}}
📅 Expected Delivery:
{{expected_date}}

We understand how frustrating this must be and we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused. Here is what happens next: 1️⃣ Our team will immediately launch an investigation into your shipment. 2️⃣ You will be contacted within 2-3 business days with an update. 3️⃣ If the parcel cannot be located, you will be eligible for a full compensation review. For immediate assistance, please contact our human agent directly. Is there anything else I can help you with?

😔 We are very sorry to hear that your
parcel arrived in a damaged condition.

We take damaged parcels very seriously
and sincerely apologize for this
unacceptable experience.

Here is what happens next:
1️⃣ Please take clear photos of the
damaged parcel and its contents.
2️⃣ Send the photos to our human agent
via WhatsApp below.
3️⃣ Our team will review your case and
process your compensation within
3-5 business days.
📸 Send photos and contact our agent immediately !
Hi! How can i help you?

messages.content:
You are a Logistics Assistant. Use the FAQ DATA below to answer.
FAQ DATA:
{{faqdata}}
Instructions:
Search the FAQ DATA for an answer that matches the user's question.

Crucial: Provide ONLY the answer text. Do not include "Q:", "A:", or the original question in your response.

If you find the answer, provide it clearly and concisely.

If the answer is not contained in the FAQ DATA, return exactly: NOT_FOUND

children.text: Sorry, no relevant answer found. Please contact support.
{{answer}}

messages.content:
System Message (Content):

Role: You are an empathetic logistics assistant.

Task: The user just provided an unclear description of their issue. Apologize politely and explain that you can only handle issues related to lost, damaged, or late parcels.

Requirement: Ask the user to describe their problem again using more specific details. Keep it under 40 words and sound very helpful.

Welcome to the Compensation & Refund service.

messages.content: You are a professional AI assistant for the Compensation & Refund department of a logistics company. Your task is to introduce yourself warmly and ask the user to describe their issue (for example: is the parcel lost, damaged, or late?). Keep your response brief, professional, and friendly. Do not use any placeholders. Keep it simple (2-3 lines) and your name is G3MX.

children.text: {{ai_greeting}}

messages.content:
Role: Logistics Logic Expert.

Task: Categorize the user's issue by analyzing the State of the Parcel.

Logical Mapping Rules:

lost: Use this if the parcel's physical location is unknown. (e.g., "missing," "not arrived," "tracking says delivered but house is empty," "where is it?").

damaged: Use this if the parcel is present but its physical condition is compromised. (e.g., "broken," "wet," "crushed").

late: Use this if the parcel is confirmed to be in transit but has exceeded the expected timeframe.

else: Use this for greetings or unrelated talk.

Strict Instruction: If a user says a parcel is "missing," "disappeared," or "nowhere to be found," the logical conclusion is lost.

Output: ONLY the single word (lost, damaged, late, or else).
Input: {{issue_input}}

System Message (Content):

Role: You are an empathetic logistics assistant.

Task: The user just provided an unclear description of their issue. Apologize politely and explain that you can only handle issues related to lost, damaged, or late parcels.

Requirement: Ask the user to describe their problem again using more specific details. Keep it under 40 words and sound very helpful.
